feedback.text: Please, stop killing games! I'll keep it short! I just want to be able to continue the play the games I purchased after the video game companies stop their support, when is no-longer profitable to maintain that support. I don't want to force video games companies to keep that support at a lost!! Just a patch so I can play the games I payed. These should be possible for must if not all games. For single player games its a no-brainer. For massively multiplayer online Video Games could be trickier but no impossible. Thank you for your time. Paulo
